RESHARD-FLIP.summary: Source side: early-ownership-flip variant. For each of the N slots that the prior RDMA RESHARD registered, locks source-side r_allocator blocks (immutable), tells the recipient to claim ownership via CLUSTER SETSLOT NODE, then locally releases ownership by directly invoking the slot-table helpers (bypassing the standard SETSLOT NODE safety check that forbids releasing a slot while local keys still exist).
